creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Tue Nov  5 11:20:30 2013
New Revision: 332831
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332831

Log:
  devel/py-memoryprofiler: update to 0.30
  
  - Update to 0.30
  - Fix PSUTIL dependency package name
  
  PR:		ports/183672
  Submitted by:	Johannes Jost Meixner <xmj chaot.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile
  head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 11:16:55 2013	(r332830)
+++ head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/Makefile	Tue Nov  5 11:20:30 2013	(r332831)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	memoryprofiler
-PORTVERSION=	0.29
+PORTVERSION=	0.30
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ LICENSE=	BSD
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	PSUTIL
 PSUTIL_DESC=	Use psutil for better performance
-PSUTIL_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}-psutil>0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/py-psutil
+PSUTIL_RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}psutil>1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/py-psutil
 
 OPTIONSFILE?=	${PORT_DBDIR}/py-${PORTNAME}/options
 

Modified: head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo	Tue Nov  5 11:16:55 2013	(r332830)
+++ head/devel/py-memoryprofiler/distinfo	Tue Nov  5 11:20:30 2013	(r332831)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (memory_profiler-0.29.tar.gz) = 30a6b5fdb9089ac4921db8411843bc03e13409259c2ed5e77ff5e2a6c9c9e733
-SIZE (memory_profiler-0.29.tar.gz) = 19847
+SHA256 (memory_profiler-0.30.tar.gz) = 6071f428fa27851efec2bf6be1833567eef986c3dbf8f4571e2acf1a30b031a1
+SIZE (memory_profiler-0.30.tar.gz) = 20112
